toolbar.upgradeTooltip: Upgrade now to keep Pro features

settings.title: Settings
settings.playLocalFileDesc: Open an audio or video file on your device and transpose
settings.tabCaptureModeDesc: Capture audio from this tab (pitch shift only)
settings.tabCaptureModePromptDesc: Check the browser prompt and allow tab audio capture.
settings.openInPopupDesc: Popup mode improves compatibility on some sites. Keeps Pro audio.
settings.openInSidepanelDesc: Resizable Workspace that stays open while you browse.
settings.onlineSupportDesc: Find answers to frequently asked questions

language.uiLanguageDesc: Language for explanations and help text.
language.termLanguageDesc: Language for terms and labels (Pitch, Loop, Speed).

settings.seekIntervalDesc: Set how many seconds to skip forward or backward.
settings.scrubPreviewDurationDesc: Length of the audio preview when you click and drag on the timeline (in ms).
settings.autoSaveDesc: Automatically saves each song to your recent history.
settings.autoResetDesc: Automatically resets controls for the next song. Turn this off to keep your settings between songs in the same tab.
settings.persistSettingsDesc: Always start with the last used settings for transpose, pitch, and speed. When turned off, the extension will start with its default settings.
settings.sidepanelModeDesc: Open the Workspace in the side panel. More space, resizable, and persistent while you browse. Popup keeps Pro audio with basic controls.
settings.premiumAudioDesc: Enjoy our best pitch-shift algorithm, low-latency performance, and a high-resolution timeline for precise looping.
settings.lowLatencyModeDesc: Minimizes audio delay (latency) at the cost of some audio quality. Not available when using Formant shifting.
settings.mouseWheelControlDesc: Hover over sliders or numbers to make quick adjustments with the mouse wheel.
settings.referenceTuningDesc: Allows you to set the tuning of the recording and your instrument (in Hz), so pitch adjustments can be matched to non-standard or historical tuning standards.
settings.varispeedInPitchDesc: Links pitch and playback speed, so pitch changes also affect tempo. This preserves the natural sound character and avoids time-stretching artifacts.
settings.extendedRangeDesc: Extend the transpose range from 12 to 36 semitones
settings.enableShortcutsSidepanel: Control playback with your keyboard when the side panel is focused.
settings.enableShortcutsPopup: Control playback with your keyboard while the extension popup is open.
settings.customShortcutsDesc: Change the mapping of the shortcuts. Otherwise, defaults are used.
settings.clearHistoryDesc: Removes all saved songs from the history list.
settings.resetSettingsDesc: Restores all extension settings to their defaults.
settings.resetScenesDesc: Restores all scenes to their factory presets.
settings.revokePermissionsDesc: Removes access for all websites you have previously granted.
settings.permissionsRevoked: All website permissions have been revoked.
settings.pitchDisplayDesc: Choose how pitch values are displayed (Cents or Hz).

dialog.clearHistoryDesc: This will permanently remove all saved songs from the history list. This cannot be undone.
dialog.resetSettingsDesc: This will restore all extension settings to their defaults. This cannot be undone.
dialog.resetScenesDesc: This will restore all scenes to their factory presets. Your customizations will be lost.
dialog.revokePermissionsDesc: This will remove access for all websites you have previously granted. You will be asked for permission again on each site.

loop.countInTooltip: Count in: wait a few seconds at loops

history.title: History
history.autoSaveOff: Auto-save is off. Turn it on in Settings to automatically save new songs to your recent history.
history.savedFreeBanner:
Organize your songs in custom lists with Pro.
Your library is securely stored in the cloud.
history.savedProPopupBanner:
Your songs and lists are synced in the cloud.
Open the side panel to view and manage your library.
history.recentEmpty: Your recently played songs will appear here.
history.deleteListDesc: Delete "{{name}}"? Songs will be moved to "{{defaultPlaylist}}".

panelNoMedia.title: No playable media
panelNoMedia.desc: This page does not contain playable audio or video.

panelNoMediaBlocked.title: Page not supported
panelNoMediaBlocked.desc: This page is not supported for direct playback.

panelAllowAccess.title: Activation required
panelAllowAccess.desc: Activate Transpose on this site to continue.

panelStartPlayback.title: Start playback
panelStartPlayback.desc: Start audio or video on this page to activate Transpose.

panelNoPitchShift.title: Pitch not available
panelNoPitchShift.desc: Use tab capture to continue with pitch shifting on this page.
panelNoPitchShift.descCors: Use tab capture to continue with pitch shifting on this page.
panelNoPitchShift.descConflict: Try disabling other audio or video extensions, or use tab capture to continue.

panelNoCompatiblePlayer.title: No compatible player detected
panelNoCompatiblePlayer.desc: Audio is playing, but no compatible player was detected.

connectionInfo.approvalRequired: Approval is required in the browser prompt.
connectionInfo.statusChecking: Checking the page for a playable source.
connectionInfo.disconnectedDesc: Activate Transpose from the browser toolbar to continue on this page.

markers.markerAlreadyExistsAtCurrentTimeTooltip: A marker already exists at the current time

banner.subEndedHead: Your Pro access has ended. Advanced practice tools are currently unavailable.

subAlert.cancelPendingDesc: You still have full access until then.
subAlert.pauseScheduledDesc: You still have full access until then.

shortcutSettings.copiedUrl: Shortcut settings URL copied. Paste it into the address bar.
